assignments.twist: SI-type peer-effect adoption (Bass model) on a bounded Cartesian lattice with a spontaneous-adoption source term, analyzed as a spatial stochastic spreading process
aggregate adoption is the Bass diffusion of innovations, the mean-field sigmoidal limit of the microscopic peer-spreading rule

core_model_summary: A stochastic peer-driven adoption (Bass/SI-type) spreading process on a bounded D-dimensional lattice, where each unit switches irreversibly to adopter at a rate combining spontaneous and neighbor-proportional terms, and boundary sites adopt less.
